settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage API, workflows, CLI, and project info in one place.
settings.aboutDesc: Local AI studio for canvas, online image generation, and ComfyUI workflows.
settings.versionStatusDesc: Check the project version and open the release page when an update is available.
settings.cliHintDesc: Jimeng, GPT, and Antigravity CLI tools live on the CLI tab.
settings.cliPageDesc: Install dependencies from the CLI folder first. Uses local CLI login state — no API key stored in this app.

canvasList.empty: No canvases yet. Click "New Canvas" to start.

chat.title: GPT Chat
chat.placeholder: Type a message. Enter to send...
chat.attachmentLimit: You can attach up to {{count}} files
chat.settingsHint: Change model and mode from the composer bar. Use this panel for the system prompt only.
chat.startDescription: Type your first message to begin. A conversation is created automatically when you send it.
chat.composerHint: Click to change model or mode

studio.workflowUnavailableHint: Local ComfyUI is missing required dependencies for this workflow
studio.localComfyOffline: ComfyUI is offline; cannot verify local workflow dependencies
studio.workflowExportHint: Load this workflow in ComfyUI to inspect missing models and custom nodes
studio.zimageControlImageHint: Control mode uses ControlNet Union; output size is configured below.
studio.zimageControlImageRequired: Upload a control reference image first
studio.zimageControlHintCanny: Canny edge map for outline and composition control. Uses built-in ComfyUI Canny — no HuggingFace download.
studio.zimageControlHintDepth: Depth map for spatial layout control.
studio.zimageControlHintPose: OpenPose skeleton for human pose control.
studio.zimageControlHintHed: HED soft edges for natural outline control.
studio.zimageControlHintMlsd: MLSD line structure for architecture and perspective control.
studio.zimageControlResFollowHint: Output size follows the reference after preprocessing (GetImageSize).
studio.zimageControlModelHintDepth: Place weights at {ComfyUI}/custom_nodes/comfyui_controlnet_aux/ckpts/depth-anything/Depth-Anything-V2-Large/depth_anything_v2_vitl.pth. Download: https://huggingface.co/depth-anything/Depth-Anything-V2-Large. If ComfyUI HF_ENDPOINT=hf-mirror.com fails (often HTTP 308), use Canny or fix the mirror.
studio.zimageControlModelHintPose: Needs OpenPose weights (body/hand/face) under {ComfyUI}/custom_nodes/comfyui_controlnet_aux/ckpts/ from lllyasviel/Annotators. If HF_ENDPOINT is broken, use Canny or install weights manually.
studio.zimageControlModelHintHed: Needs ControlNetHED.pth (lllyasviel/Annotators). If the HF mirror fails, use Canny or place the file under controlnet_aux/ckpts.
studio.zimageControlModelHintMlsd: Needs mlsd_large_512_fp32.pth (lllyasviel/Annotators). If the HF mirror fails, use Canny or place the file under controlnet_aux/ckpts.
studio.zimageHfDownloadFailed: HuggingFace weight download failed (often HF_ENDPOINT=hf-mirror.com unreachable or HTTP 308). Switch to Canny edges; or place Depth/Pose weights manually; or unset HF_ENDPOINT and restart ComfyUI. Infinite Canvas cannot change ComfyUI's HF_ENDPOINT.
studio.modelscopeTokenRequired: Configure ModelScope token in API settings first
studio.deleteArchiveConfirm: Delete this archive entry? Associated image files will also be removed.
studio.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected archive entries? Associated image files will also be removed.
studio.addToLibraryFailed: Failed to add to asset library
studio.deleteAssetConfirm: Delete this asset? The associated file will also be removed.
studio.deleteSelectedAssetsConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected assets? Associated files will also be removed.
studio.angleTimeoutContinue: Cloud generation is taking longer. Continue waiting?

online.title: Online Image
online.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate or edit...
online.noProviders: No image providers — add one in API settings
online.refDropHint: Drag archive images here, or hover a card and choose Use as reference
